hero.title: Feel the atmosphere of travel
hero.text: Immerse yourself in a world of culture, nature and unforgettable experiences with personalized tips

features.title: Choose not just a direction — choose an approach to traveling!

footer.text: Adaptive travel guide - find new places, plan trips, get recommendations based on your preferences.

about.title: About the project Adaptive Travel Guide
about.p1: This project is a web application that functions as an adaptive travel guide, focused on personalizing some aspects of the trip, including the choice of locations, activities, gastronomy, cultural events, and other elements that form a complete travel experience.
about.p2: The web application is distinguished by a comprehensive approach, providing a personalized travel experience in a convenient, unified interface - taking into account the purpose of the trip, the user's interests, and external conditions.
about.p3: Technologies used: React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Python, Django and OpenWeatherMap API.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.p1: Hello! My name is Olga. I am the author and developer of the Adaptive Travel Guide project, created as part of my coursework/diploma work.
